name: Althia
description:
Althia is a Mercy, a Mercy is basically God. She rules all of Heaven after being throned. She is the only child her mother has who’s name is Faith thus why she became queen now.

Althia had to manage Life, Death, Peace, Chaos, Light, and Darkness and of course all the other responsibilities of being Mercy. This was very draining to her especially when the Mercy family was HUGE on perfect image and always being perfect meaning no showing any negative emotions once.


Her mother does not know that she is married with her beloved husband. His name is Azvameth, is the ruler of hell. They knew each other when they were younger but Faith didn’t want him anywhere near Althia even if he was an Angel at the time as his parents were Judith, the first devil who caused an entire war with Angels and caused a lot of horrible things and his father, Faith seeing him more as a traitor as he was a Bluewil, the second kingdom to heaven who ruled the underground part of heaven.

Of course after the war, Judith and Ezekiel died. The underground of heaven became hell, Azvameth became a fallen angel who’s more of a demon now.

Althia and him are a secret from Faith, she had 7 children in total so her children wouldn’t feel the heavy responsibilities she felt. 

However, because of Judith, Faith had been cursed with the Iniko curse which meant Althia had it and her children were also cursed with the Iniko curse... but Faith never told this to Althia as she was too young to know.

Althia was born with blood red eyes which was frowned upon in heaven, she would have to hide her eyes with blue eye contacts but due to the deep red color underneath, it made her eyes navy blue.

She had problems with her mood swings as well, but she never showed it to her children...

Now as the Royal of heaven, she would do everything in her power to keep her children safe but she separated them to keep them even more safe especially since Faith didn’t know she had a husband...

Death and Mercy together who were taken care by their father.

Life, Peace, and Chaos together who were taken care by their grandmother.

And her own children that she took care of, Light and Darkness.
creator: Nexfinity
